response.justification: Candidate has strong individual contributor experience (13+ years) with relevant exposure to developer tooling, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and test automation (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium courses, GitLab/CI setup). However, the resume shows no formal people management experience — all roles are IC titles (Senior/Staff Software Developer/Engineer). The JD requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership in a management context, which is not demonstrated. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also limited (some iOS/Apple TV work, but not at scale).
strengths: Strong developer-tools background: test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, Selenium training
13+ years of software engineering across diverse stacks, exceeding the 8-year minimum
Demonstrated technical leadership signals: workshops, talks, mentoring, course creation
concerns: No explicit people-management role — all titles are individual contributor
Limited large-scale mobile-platform ecosystem experience required by the role
No evidence of leading organizational change or managing performance/1:1s

key_factors.factor: Strong dev-tools and testing infrastructure background
